---
# Geofence-summary exhibit. Per-device aggregate of the Sensorvault
# Step 1 production: one row per anonymized device with first/last
# record times, total record count, and the smallest / largest Maps
# Display Radius observed.
#
# Render with:  quarto render exhibit-geofence-summary.qmd

format: warrant-vignette-typst
document-types:
  - attachment
  - exhibit

# ---- Header consistency ----
state: "Indiana"
county: "Pawnee County"
city: "Pawnee"
detective-name: "Detective B. Macklin"
case-number: "CR24-087"

# ---- Exhibit content ----
exhibit-description: |
  Attached is a summary of records received from Google LLC in
  response to the geofence search warrant. The table aggregates
  the per-device counts, time ranges, and Maps Display Radii.

exhibit-type: geofence-summary
exhibit-title: "Summary of Records Received from Google"
exhibit-device: "Pawnee County Court, Case CR24-087"

# Records live in a separate YAML data file because Pandoc's typst
# metadata writer drops the dict contents for this record schema.
exhibit-records-file: "data/exhibit-geofence-summary-records.yaml"
---
